# SSH 同步推送 (local → remote)
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 递归推送目录
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "push", "local_path": "./dist", "remote_path": "/opt/app/dist", "recursive": true}
aitk SSH_

# 推送并删除远程多余文件
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "push", "local_path": "./dist", "remote_path": "/opt/app/dist", "recursive": true, "delete": true}
aitk SSH_

# dry-run 只看不做
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "push", "local_path": "./dist", "remote_path": "/opt/app/dist", "recursive": true, "dry_run": true}
aitk SSH_

# include/exclude 过滤 (只同步js，排除.map)
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "push", "local_path": "./dist", "remote_path": "/opt/app/dist", "recursive": true, "include": ["dist/**"], "exclude": ["**/*.map"]}
aitk SSH_
